feedback: the overall experience with this operator in trivandrum has been consistently positive across ev metric that matters to me, network coverage is strong internet speed is fast call quality is excellent and the plan at rs 349 delivers genuine value, a complete positive experience

The 5G promise remains unfulfilled in Mysore despite months of marketing. Coverage is practically nonexistent and where it does connect the speeds are barely better than 4G. For the premium charged for 5G plans this is a clear case of selling something that does not exist yet.

The overall experience with this operator in Kolkata has been consistently positive across every metric that matters to me. netwrk coverage is strong internet speed is fast call quality is excellent and the plan at Rs 499 delivers genuine value. A complete positive experience.

the 5g experience is impressive when it works but it only works in about twenty percent of pune, when connected speeds r genuinely fast at 150 mbps, but the limited coverage means i am on 4g most of the time which defeats the purpose of the 5g plan

The SonyLIV bundle is a nice addition but the data balance runs out too fast to actually stream anything and the validity period is too short. The entertainment benefit exists in theory but is impractical given the data and validity constraints.

Billing transparency is zero with this operator. Random charges appear every cycle and when you call supprt they cannot explain them clearly. I am tired of fighting over Rs 399 in mystery charges every single month. The billing system is either broken or deliberately opaque.
Calls keep dropping.
Zee5 works I guess.
covrage and speed are good but support and billing are nightmares.

The data balance of 1.5GB daily is insufficient for modern usage and runs out by early afternoon. Then the throttled speed is so slow that the phone becomes practically useless. Combined with the short validity period this plan is designed to frustrate users into paying more.

The internet speed in Pune has been consistently terrible at barely 200 Mbps making even basic tasks like checking email painfully slow. This is not what I signed up for when I chose their premium plan. The disparity between advertised and actual speeds amounts to false advertising.
